## Active DB Safety

- [ ] Does not overwrite `D:\Music\MusicDB\data\processed\Main_Song_Database.csv`
- [ ] Uses dry-run mode before write mode where applicable
- [ ] Includes backup path if active DB changes are proposed
- [ ] Includes row counts or quality summary where applicable
- [ ] Does not include `.env`, API keys, tokens, client secrets, or passwords
